10. Characteristics

Table 7. Characteristics

| Symbol | Parameter | Conditions | Min | Typ | Max | Unit |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| $V_F$ | forward voltage | $I_F = 0.1 \text{ mA};$ pulsed; $t_p \leq 300 \mu\text{s}; \delta \leq 0.02; T_{\text{amb}} = 25^\circ\text{C}$ | - | 90 | 180 | mV |
| | | $I_F = 1 \text{ mA};$ pulsed; $t_p \leq 300 \mu\text{s}; \delta \leq 0.02; T_{\text{amb}} = 25^\circ\text{C}$ | - | 150 | 200 | mV |
| | | $I_F = 10 \text{ mA};$ pulsed; $t_p \leq 300 \mu\text{s}; \delta \leq 0.02; T_{\text{amb}} = 25^\circ\text{C}$ | - | 210 | 270 | mV |
| | | $I_F = 100 \text{ mA};$ pulsed; $t_p \leq 300 \mu\text{s}; \delta \leq 0.02; T_{\text{amb}} = 25^\circ\text{C}$ | - | 295 | 360 | mV |
| | | $I_F = 500 \text{ mA};$ pulsed; $t_p \leq 300 \mu\text{s}; \delta \leq 0.02; T_{\text{amb}} = 25^\circ\text{C}$ | - | 430 | 500 | mV |
| | | $I_F = 1 \text{ A};$ pulsed; $t_p \leq 300 \mu\text{s}; \delta \leq 0.02; T_{\text{amb}} = 25^\circ\text{C}$ | - | 610 | 680 | mV |
| $I_R$ | reverse current | $V_R = 10 \text{ V}; T_{\text{amb}} = 25^\circ\text{C}$ | - | 15 | 200 | $\mu\text{A}$ |
| | | $V_R = 30 \text{ V}; T_{\text{amb}} = 25^\circ\text{C}$ | - | 70 | 500 | $\mu\text{A}$ |
| $C_d$ | diode capacitance | $V_R = 1 \text{ V}; f = 1 \text{ MHz}; T_{\text{amb}} = 25^\circ\text{C}$ | - | 24 | 30 | pF |
